title: Emerging Technology Security Culture Portal
tagline: A readiness portal for aligning security culture with AI, IoT, cloud, edge, quantum, and zero-trust adoption.

book.title: Artificial Intelligence for Security Culture Transformation
book.author: Musaab Hasan
book.alignment: Chapter 16: Emerging Technologies and Their Impact on Security Culture
book.theme: Technology-adaptive security culture, secure innovation, anticipatory controls, and responsible adoption.

dimensions.label: AI Security Readiness
dimensions.description: Measures secure and responsible adoption of AI-enabled workflows.

dimensions.label: IoT Awareness
dimensions.description: Tracks awareness of device, sensor, and operational technology risks.

dimensions.label: Cloud and Edge Behavior
dimensions.description: Measures secure configuration, data handling, and shared responsibility.

dimensions.label: Zero-Trust Mindset
dimensions.description: Assesses identity-first, least-privilege, and verification behaviors.

dimensions.label: Quantum Preparedness
dimensions.description: Tracks early awareness of cryptographic transition needs.

dimensions.label: Innovation Governance
dimensions.description: Measures whether new technology decisions include risk and ethics checks.

workflows: Assess readiness by emerging technology domain.
Identify culture gaps that could lead to shadow technology or unsafe adoption.
Create targeted interventions for teams adopting new platforms.
Review readiness as part of innovation governance and architecture boards.
evidence_examples: Assessment score movement with dated evidence.
Documented behavior observations from simulations or operational workflows.
Leadership review notes, action owners, and completed improvement tasks.
